description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow named CI/CD that handles multiple jobs for style checks, testing, building, and deploying a Python project. The workflow should trigger on push to main, pull requests to main, and on release publication. It should include jobs for style checks with isort, flake8, black, and djhtml, testing with a matrix of Python versions and databases, building a Python package, uploading it to PyPI, building a Docker image, and pushing it to GitHub Packages.
